mapper.sql: a.PRV_APLY_SN, a.USR_SN, u.USR_NM, a.CAT_SN, c.CAT_NM, a.PRV_APLY_STATUS_CD, status_code.CMM_NM AS STATUS_NM, a.PRV_APLY_RJCT_RSN_CN, a.PRV_APLY_TYPE_CD, a.PRV_APLY_REG_DT
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN USR_EML_CERT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM USERS WHERE USR_SN = #{userSn}

SELECT FROM PROVIDER_APPLY a JOIN USERS u ON u.USR_SN=a.USR_SN JOIN CATEGORY c ON c.CAT_SN=a.CAT_SN JOIN CMM_CODE status_code ON status_code.CMM_CD=a.PRV_APLY_STATUS_CD WHERE a.USR_SN=#{userSn} AND a.PRV_APLY_ACTV_YN='Y' ORDER BY a.PRV_APLY_REG_DT DESC

SELECT FROM PROVIDER_APPLY a JOIN USERS u ON u.USR_SN=a.USR_SN JOIN CATEGORY c ON c.CAT_SN=a.CAT_SN JOIN CMM_CODE status_code ON status_code.CMM_CD=a.PRV_APLY_STATUS_CD WHERE a.PRV_APLY_ACTV_YN='Y' AND a.PRV_APLY_STATUS_CD=#{statusCode} ORDER BY a.PRV_APLY_REG_DT ASC

SELECT FROM PROVIDER_APPLY a JOIN USERS u ON u.USR_SN=a.USR_SN JOIN CATEGORY c ON c.CAT_SN=a.CAT_SN JOIN CMM_CODE status_code ON status_code.CMM_CD=a.PRV_APLY_STATUS_CD WHERE a.PRV_APLY_SN=#{applicationSn} AND a.PRV_APLY_ACTV_YN='Y' FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROVIDER_APPLY WHERE USR_SN=#{userSn} AND CAT_SN=#{categorySn} AND PRV_APLY_ACTV_YN='Y' AND PRV_APLY_STATUS_CD='PRVC0002'

SELECT paf.PRV_APLY_FL_SN AS applicationFileSn, paf.PRV_APLY_SN AS applicationSn, paf.FL_SN AS flSn, paf.PRV_APLY_FL_TYPE_CD AS fileTypeCode, file_type.CMM_NM AS fileTypeName, f.FL_ORG_NM AS fileName FROM PROVIDER_APPLY_FILE paf JOIN FILES f ON f.FL_SN=paf.FL_SN JOIN CMM_CODE file_type ON file_type.CMM_CD=paf.PRV_APLY_FL_TYPE_CD WHERE paf.PRV_APLY_SN=#{applicationSn} AND f.FL_USE_YN='Y' ORDER BY paf.PRV_APLY_FL_SN ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE PROVIDER_APPLY SET PRV_APLY_STATUS_CD=#{statusCode},PRV_APLY_RJCT_RSN_CN=#{reason},PRV_APLY_UPDT_ID=#{actorId} WHERE PRV_APLY_SN=#{applicationSn} AND PRV_APLY_STATUS_CD='PRVC0002' AND PRV_APLY_ACTV_YN='Y'
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM PROVIDER_CATEGORY_PERMISSION WHERE USR_SN=#{userSn} AND CAT_SN=#{categorySn} AND PRV_CAT_PRM_STATUS_CD='PRVC0006' AND PRV_CAT_PRM_USE_YN='Y')
